message:
feat: add GitHub social preview image (1280x640)

Generate gh_og_share_image.png from the ACFS illustration using
the gh-og-share-images skill. The hero image mode preserves the
illustration's built-in title and visual context with a subtle
edge vignette for social media polish.

To activate: GitHub Settings > Social preview > Edit > Upload

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
